essays:
Matrix multiplication:
[ 1  2 ]     [ 5  6 ]     [ 6   8 ]
[ 3  4 ]  x  [ 7  8 ]  =  [ 10  12 ]
I lined the two matrices up and added the numbers that are in the same spot, so 1+5=6, 2+6=8, 3+7=10, 4+8=12.

Convolution (filter applied to image patch):
[ 1   0 ]     [ 4  5 ]
[ 0  -1 ]  *  [ 6  7 ]  =  -3
Each filter value multiplies the number under it and then I add all four results together: 1*4 + 0*5 + 0*6 + -1*7 = -3.
